name: Clawdia Bridge
description: Local orchestrator for inbox, CRM, calendar, research, review, and knowledge sync.

skills.name: Daily Ops Orchestration
skills.description: Turns inbox, CRM, and calendar state into an actionable daily plan.
examples: Build today's operating plan from internal state.
Summarize what needs attention before noon.

skills.name: Knowledge Sync
skills.description: Aggregates structured task state into execution snapshots and user digests.
examples: Generate a fresh execution state snapshot.
Prepare a short digest for the user.

skills.name: Research Fanout
skills.description: Runs breadth-first research with scoped subagents and synthesizes the result.
examples: Investigate competitors in parallel and merge findings.
Research a market trend and return a concise recommendation.
